item.title: How to create a simple Golang Server
item.description: Introduction Am going to be showing you the go way of building a server. Requirement and assumed knowledge Programming experience. Some DOS command-line knowledge. How to install go on your machine (see the Installation Instructions). Any code editor (for me I will be using Visual Studio Code Editor because of it simplicity and looks). if you just want to get along without having to install any of those you could use golang online compiler at https://play.

item.title: How to Format BsDatePicker to TimeDate in Angular 9
item.description: Introduction In these tutorial I will discuss on how to add datepicker and convert to dateTime/any formart in our Angular Forms. Getting Started BsDatepicker is a package found in ngx-bootstrap which contains all core (and not only) Bootstrap components powered by Angular. Installation instructions Install ngx-bootstrap from npm: npm install ngx-bootstrap --sav Note: Here, don’t forget to import FormsModule in main module before start using the input elements.

item.title: How to Upload to Github Using Git
item.description: How to upload to github using git with cmd or terminal What is git? Git is the most used modern version control system in the world today. A large amount of software project use git Git for version control. Git can handle everything from small to very large projects with speed and efficiency. Companies & Projects Using Git The list is long but am just going to provide a few common name we are all familiar with link to the project itself incase you are intrested in looking at the codebase.

item.title: About Tejiri
item.description: Tejiri is the owner of Gilgal Global Technology Service. Fomerly with Softquest System a Software company in Abuja, Nig. Am a full stack with strong knowledge with Angular & Golang developer, I was use to developing in Laravel, PHP. I trans because I want to once and run anywhere mobile and desktop. I have an excellence knowledge with wordpress CMS. Beside all this I good know how on Digital marketing. Currently providing this services to two companies.

item.title: Contact
item.description: You can contact me on any of the listed channels here. Send an email below.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Features of this website includes the following: Unlimited pages Contact forms Responsive design for both mobile and desktop Unlimited @domain.com emails Google Analytics for real time monitoring Easy and maintainable back without and coding required Azoproperty.com.ng -This is property listens site: goto site Phermdorah.com.ng -Company profile and services site: goto site 299mold.com -Company profile and services site: goto site Ogamco.com -Company profile and services site: goto site
